desc.zh: 持仓标的中间价达到此价格时自动触发止盈平仓。价格区间为 [0.5, 1.0]。
desc.en: Auto take-profit when the held token's mid price reaches this level. Range [0.5, 1.0].

disable_note.zh: 设为 1.0：市场价格最高趋近 1，止盈永不触发
disable_note.en: Set to 1.0: price never reaches 1, TP never fires

desc.zh: 持仓标的中间价跌破此价格时自动触发止损平仓。价格区间为 [0.0, 1.0]。
desc.en: Auto stop-loss when the held token's mid price falls below this level. Range [0.0, 1.0].

disable_note.zh: 设为 0.0：价格不会跌至 0，止损永不触发
disable_note.en: Set to 0.0: price never falls to 0, SL never fires

desc.zh: 市场到期前剩余秒数不足此值时，强制平掉所有持仓，防止在到期时刻持有未结仓位。区间为 [0, 300]。
desc.en: Force-close all positions when remaining seconds fall below this threshold, preventing open positions at expiry. Range [0, 300].

disable_note.zh: 设为 0：不提前强制平仓，持仓直至市场结算
disable_note.en: Set to 0: no early force-close, positions held until settlement

desc.zh: 连续亏损次数达到此阈值时，触发仓位缩减机制，降低后续每笔交易的仓位比例。区间为 [1, 20]。
desc.en: Triggers position reduction when consecutive losses reach this count. Range [1, 20].

disable_note.zh: 设为 20（最大值）：几乎不可能连续亏损 20 次，降仓机制实际失效
disable_note.en: Set to 20 (max): virtually impossible to lose 20 times in a row, mechanism effectively disabled

desc.zh: 触发连续亏损阈值后，每次入场仓位缩减的比例。0 = 不缩减，1 = 完全不入场。区间为 [0.0, 1.0]。
desc.en: Fraction by which position size is reduced after hitting the consecutive-loss threshold. 0 = no reduction, 1 = no new entries. Range [0.0, 1.0].

disable_note.zh: 设为 0.0：即使触发阈值，仓位也不缩减，降仓机制实际失效
disable_note.en: Set to 0.0: no size reduction even after threshold hit, mechanism effectively disabled

desc.zh: 只在中间价高于此阈值的标的上入场，用于过滤价格过低、流动性差的尾盘标的。区间为 [0.5, 1.0]。
desc.en: Only consider tokens whose mid price is above this threshold, filtering out illiquid low-priced markets. Range [0.5, 1.0].

disable_note.zh: 设为 0.5（最小值）：所有入场候选均可通过，价格过滤实际失效
disable_note.en: Set to 0.5 (min): all entry candidates pass, price filter effectively disabled

desc.zh: 只允许在市场剩余时间比例（剩余 ticks / 总 ticks）低于此阈值时入场，避免在市场初期不确定性过高时进场。区间为 [0.0, 1.0]。
desc.en: Only allow entry when remaining time ratio (remaining ticks / total ticks) is below this threshold, avoiding early entry when uncertainty is high. Range [0.0, 1.0].

disable_note.zh: 设为 1.0：剩余时间比例永远≤ 1.0，入场时间限制实际失效，任意时刻均可入场
disable_note.en: Set to 1.0: remaining ratio is always ≤ 1.0, time gate effectively disabled, entry allowed at any time

desc.zh: 计算入场动量（价格涨幅）所用的历史价格窗口时长（秒）。刺活后： momentum = (窗口末 - 窗口初) / 窗口初。通过关闭“启用动量检测”开关可屏蔽此参数。区间为 [60, 3600]。
desc.en: History window (seconds) for computing entry momentum (price rise). momentum = (end - start) / start. Disable via the "Enable Momentum Check" toggle. Range [60, 3600].

disable_note.zh: 关闭“启用动量检测”开关即可屏蔽此参数
disable_note.en: Disable via the "Enable Momentum Check" toggle

desc.zh: 入场所需的最小涨幅（动量窗口内价格涨幅），过滤横盘或下跌行情的标的。通过关闭“启用动量检测”开关可屏蔽此参数。区间为 [0.0, 0.1]。
desc.en: Minimum price rise (within the momentum window) required for entry, filtering out flat or falling markets. Disable via the "Enable Momentum Check" toggle. Range [0.0, 0.1].

disable_note.zh: 设为 0.0：无最小涨幅要求，动量过滤实际失效；建议直接关闭该开关
disable_note.en: Set to 0.0: no minimum momentum required, filter disabled; prefer turning off the toggle instead

desc.zh: 计算上涨 tick 占比时使用的历史窗口时长（秒）。窗口内上涨 tick 占比 > 50% 才允许入场。通过关闭“启用方向一致性检测”开匦可屏蔽。区间为 [60, 3600]。
desc.en: History window (seconds) for counting up-tick ratio. Entry requires up-ticks > 50% in the window. Disable via the "Enable Direction Check" toggle. Range [60, 3600].

disable_note.zh: 关闭“启用方向一致性检测”开关即可屏蔽此参数
disable_note.en: Disable via the "Enable Direction Check" toggle

desc.zh: 振幅、标准差、最大回撤等波动类指标共用的历史窗口时长（秒）。窗口越长，计算结果越平滑但对短期变动效应越慢。区间为 [60, 3600]。
desc.en: Shared history window (seconds) for amplitude, std-dev, and max-drawdown calculations. Larger window gives smoother but slower-responding metrics. Range [60, 3600].

disable_note.zh: 此窗口为波动检测类参数共用，无法单独禁用；请关闭各对应的波动检测开关
disable_note.en: Shared by all volatility checks; disable each check individually via its toggle

desc.zh: 入场所需的最小价格振幅（窗口内高低价之差 / 最低价），过滤波动过小、价格过于平稳的市场。通过关闭“启用振幅检测”开关可屏蔽。区间为 [0.0, 5.0]。
desc.en: Minimum price amplitude (window high-low / low) required for entry, filtering out flat markets. Disable via the "Enable Amplitude Check" toggle. Range [0.0, 5.0].

disable_note.zh: 设为 0.0：振幅永远 ≥ 0，下限条件始终满足；建议直接关闭该开关
disable_note.en: Set to 0.0: amplitude always ≥ 0, lower bound always met; prefer turning off the toggle

desc.zh: 入场所允许的最大价格振幅，防止在波动过大、大幅波动的市场中进场。通过关闭“启用振幅检测”开关可屏蔽。区间为 [0.0, 5.0]。
desc.en: Maximum price amplitude allowed for entry, preventing entry in highly volatile markets. Disable via the "Enable Amplitude Check" toggle. Range [0.0, 5.0].

disable_note.zh: 设为 5.0（最大值）：振幅上限条件几乎始终满足；建议直接关闭该开关
disable_note.en: Set to 5.0 (max): upper bound almost always met; prefer turning off the toggle

desc.zh: 入场所允许的最大相对标准差（标准差 / 均价），过高说明价格不稳定，热点止检不过高的氾动市场。通过关闭“启用标准差检测”开关可屏蔽。区间为 [0.0, 1.0]。
desc.en: Maximum relative standard deviation (std / mean) allowed for entry; high values indicate a volatile, unstable market. Disable via the "Enable Std Dev Check" toggle. Range [0.0, 1.0].

disable_note.zh: 设为 1.0：窗口内相对标准差几乎不会达到 1.0，标准差过滤实际失效；建议直接关闭该开关
disable_note.en: Set to 1.0: relative std almost never reaches 1.0, filter effectively disabled; prefer turning off the toggle

desc.zh: 入场所允许的波动窗口内最大回撤比例（上涌到底部跌幅），过高则放弃入场，避免在价格已大峽回调后入场。通过关闭“启用回撤检测”开关可屏蔽。区间为 [0.0, 1.0]。
desc.en: Maximum drawdown ratio (peak-to-trough decline) within the volatility window allowed for entry; too high means price already dropped sharply. Disable via the "Enable Drawdown Check" toggle. Range [0.0, 1.0].

disable_note.zh: 设为 1.0：窗口回撤 100% 几乎不会出现，回撤过滤实际失效；建议直接关闭该开关
disable_note.en: Set to 1.0: 100% drawdown almost never happens, filter effectively disabled; prefer turning off the toggle

desc.zh: 检测近期是否存在反向回调的时间窗口（秒）。窗口内价格回撤超过 reverse_threshold 则放弃入场。通过关闭“启用反转检测”开关可屏蔽。区间为 [5, 300]。
desc.en: Time window (seconds) for detecting recent reversal. Abandons entry if price dropping by more than reverse_threshold within this window. Disable via the "Enable Reverse Check" toggle. Range [5, 300].

disable_note.zh: 关闭“启用反转检测”开关即可屏蔽此参数
disable_note.en: Disable via the "Enable Reverse Check" toggle

desc.zh: 反向窗口内价格最大回调超过此值则放弃入场，应对局部已出现反转的情况。通过关闭“启用反转检测”开关可屏蔽。区间为 [0.0, 0.1]。
desc.en: Max price retracement within the reverse window before abandoning entry, catching local reversals. Disable via the "Enable Reverse Check" toggle. Range [0.0, 0.1].

disable_note.zh: 设为 0.1（最大值）：短期 10% 越势回调几乎不会出现，反转过滤实际失效；建议直接关闭该开关
disable_note.en: Set to 0.1 (max): 10% short-term reversal almost never occurs, filter effectively disabled; prefer turning off the toggle

desc.zh: 单次入场使用的最小仓位比例（占可用资金），保证每次入场具有一定規模。区间为 [0.01, 1.0]。
desc.en: Minimum position size (fraction of available capital) per entry, ensuring a minimum trade size. Range [0.01, 1.0].

disable_note.zh: 设为 0.01（最小值）：下限几乎无绳束，仓位大小由 position_max_pct 决定
disable_note.en: Set to 0.01 (min): lower bound almost unconstrained, size determined by position_max_pct

desc.zh: 单次入场使用的最大仓位比例（占可用资金），防止应仓过重。合理设置可控制单笔交易风险暖。区间为 [0.01, 1.0]。
desc.en: Maximum position size (fraction of available capital) per entry, preventing excessive concentration. Range [0.01, 1.0].

disable_note.zh: 设为 1.0：不限制仓位上限，允许全仓入场（高风险，谨慎使用）
disable_note.en: Set to 1.0: no cap on position size, full capital entry allowed (high risk, use with caution)

desc.zh: 开启后会利用《动量检测窗口》和《最小涨幅》配合过滤步骤，只选取高涨幅趋势标的入场。未开启时跳过动量查验。
desc.en: When enabled, applies momentum (price rise in window) filter using Momentum Window and Min Momentum. When disabled, the momentum step is skipped entirely.

desc.zh: 开启后会根据《方向一致性检测窗口》计算窗口内上涨 tick 占比，要求价格主要向上运动（上涨 > 50%）才允许入场。未开启时跳过方向查验。
desc.en: When enabled, checks that up-ticks exceed 50% in the Direction Window before entry. When disabled, the directional consistency step is skipped.

desc.zh: 开启后会计算波动窗口内的相对标准差，过高则放弃入场，过滤价格不稳定的泛动市场。未开启时跳过标准差查验。
desc.en: When enabled, computes relative std dev in the volatility window and rejects entry if it exceeds Max Std Dev, filtering unstable markets. When disabled, the std-dev step is skipped.

desc.zh: 开启后会检测波动窗口内的最大回撤，过高则放弃入场，避免在价格已大幅回调后入场。未开启时跳过回撤查验。
desc.en: When enabled, measures peak-to-trough drawdown in the volatility window and rejects entry if it exceeds Max Drawdown, avoiding catching falling knives. When disabled, drawdown check is skipped.

desc.zh: 开启后会计算波动窗口内的最高/最低振幅，要求振幅在 [振幅下限, 振幅上限] 范围内才允许入场。未开启时跳过振幅查验。
desc.en: When enabled, computes high-low amplitude in the volatility window and requires it to fall within [Min Amplitude, Max Amplitude]. When disabled, amplitude check is skipped.

desc.zh: 开启后会检测近期《反向检测窗口》内的价格回调，超过《反向波动阈值》则放弃入场，防止在局部已反转时追高。未开启时跳过反转查验。
desc.en: When enabled, detects recent reversal within the Reverse Tick Window and abandons entry if retracement exceeds Reverse Threshold, preventing chasing a turning market. When disabled, reverse check is skipped.

description.zh: 主力策略 — 中高概率市场临近到期时中等波动顺势建仓
description.en: Main Force — Moderate volatility trend position near expiry

description.zh: 高频覆盖策略 — 宽松条件下方向一致时快速入场覆盖
description.en: High Freq Coverage — Quick entry on consistent direction with relaxed conditions
